coastal.title: Some structures lost at resort due to Fraser Canyon fires
coastal.description: A growing B.C. wildfire has forced more evacuations and closed part of the Trans-Canada Highway as officials warn gusty winds could intensify the blaze.

kamloops.title: Kamloops skies turn orange as wildfire smoke drifts into region
kamloops.description: An air quality alert remains in effect for the region due to drifting smoke from two wildfires in the Boston Bar area. The smoke is making it hard to breathe.

all.title: Federal officials set to give wildfire season update as blaze threatens B.C. town
all.description: Federal officials are set to provide an update about the national wildfire season today, as an out-of-control fire in British Columbia forced evacuations this week.
